{{Quote|Would that Captain Kassler knew you were here, the miserly fool would storm the tower and try to rob you of profitable employment.|[[Pok Nar-Ten]] to Okeefe on her employment with the Klatooinian Trade Guild|<ref name="Platt's Smugglers Guide">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Kassler''' was a grizzled old spacer, and the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the tramp [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Ravelev]]''. His ship plied the [[Anarid Cluster]]. He employed [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] for two years before she left to work for the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]], against his advice. Among the many lessons Kassler taught Okeefe, was the value of using false names.
